items.placeName: Eco Tour Thai Duong – Cua Can River Basket Boat Experience

facebook.caption:
POV: you took the slow road to Cửa Cạn River and ended up spinning in a basket boat through the mangroves.

Eco Tour Thái Dương makes this happen. 4.3 stars across 94 reviews. Small group. Real river. None of the resort-pool crowd.

This is the Phu Quoc most tourists skip because they never leave the beach strip. Don't be that tourist.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 1,732 reviews. At a café in Phu Quoc.

Cafe Green(카페그린) on 1 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is not flying under the radar, and there's a reason for that. The mango bingsu (망고빙수) here is the move. Shaved ice, fresh mango, done right in the middle of Dương Đông.

If your Phu Quoc itinerary doesn't have a café break built in, fix that. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Mango bingsu landing on the table at Cafe Green(카페그린), Dương Đông. 4.9 stars from 1,732 people, and one bite in, you get it. This is the afternoon reset your Phu Quoc trip needs.
